name: @bessel/compute
description: The compute plane of ADR M-0004: the JobHandle protocol (streaming partials, cancel), the AnalysisProduct v0 schema (intervals, series, geometry, field) with per-product Provenance sourced from the frames tier's kernel set hash, and the access and coverage engines wired end to end as jobs. Engines emit authority 'exploratory' only (iron rule 4).
